creator: stephen@FreeBSD.org
text:
Please repo-copy math/mingw32-libgmp4 to math/mingw32-libgmp

This is so that I can commit ports/163187.  The maintainer has requested this
name change for the port, since it will no longer be at version 4 of gmp.

Fix: 

Please repo-copy math/mingw32-libgmp4 to math/mingw32-libgmp
